product_overview: Chatbot Polimdo is a public web assistant for Politeknik Negeri Manado that helps prospective students and visitors quickly find information about programs, tuition, registration, scholarships, location, facilities, schedules, accreditation, and contacts without requiring login.
core_goals: Allow visitors to discover campus information (programs, tuition, registration, scholarships, location, facilities, schedules, accreditation, contacts) quickly and without authentication.
Provide an interactive chat assistant that answers campus questions via typed queries or quick-action topics.
Keep the interface simple and accessible on desktop and mobile, including navigation, accordions, and quick actions.
Persist user UI preferences (light/dark theme) across pages and sessions.
Allow users to reset the chat state and start a fresh conversation easily.

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Public landing page where visitors read hero and feature content, expand campus and FAQ sections, switch theme, and navigate to the chat assistant.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scan hero and feature cards -> Open a campus information accordion -> Close the campus information accordion -> Open a FAQ accordion -> Close the FAQ accordion -> Toggle the theme -> Navigate to /chat.html
Navigate to / -> Open the mobile menu -> Choose a navigation item -> Scroll to the chosen section

features.name: Chat Session Initialization
features.description: On entering the chat page the app initializes a chat session and displays a welcome panel with connection status; when available the backend session is created so the chat can accept messages.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat.html -> See the welcome panel and idle chat state -> Wait for session initialization to complete -> See the online/connected status

features.name: Chat Question And Response
features.description: Users can ask the virtual assistant by typing or selecting quick-action topics and receive responses shown as text, info cards, or a fallback contact card when appropriate.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat.html -> Type a question into the input -> Submit the message -> See the user message appear in the chat -> See a typing indicator -> Read the bot response rendered as text or an info card
Navigate to /chat.html -> Select a quick action topic -> Confirm the topic is submitted as a message -> See a typing indicator -> Read the bot response
Navigate to /chat.html -> Focus the input with no text -> Attempt to submit an empty message -> Observe the send control remains disabled

features.name: Clear Chat
features.description: Users can clear the visible conversation, restoring the welcome state and resetting the client session; when the backend is available the current backend session is deleted and a fresh session is created.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat.html -> Send at least one chat message -> Clear the chat -> Observe chat bubbles are removed -> See the welcome state return -> Confirm the input is empty and the send control is disabled

features.name: Theme Persistence
features.description: Users can toggle light and dark themes; the selection is persisted locally and applied across the landing and chat pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle the theme -> Navigate to /chat.html -> Observe the selected theme remains active -> Toggle the theme again
Navigate to /chat.html -> Toggle the theme -> Navigate to / -> Observe the selected theme remains active

tech_stack: REST API integration with offline local fallback

routes.description: Landing page for Chatbot Polimdo with navigation, hero CTA, feature cards, campus information accordions, FAQ accordions, theme toggle, and links to the chat page.
Chat interface for asking the Polimdo virtual assistant about programs, tuition, registration, scholarships, location, facilities, academic schedule, accreditation, and contacts.

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Visitors can browse the public landing page, open campus information sections, use FAQ accordions, switch themes, and navigate into the chatbot.
user_interactions: Click navbar links for Tentang and FAQ anchors
Open and close accordion items in Tentang Kampus and FAQ sections
Toggle light and dark theme
Click Mulai Chat buttons or floating chat button to open chat.html
On mobile, open the hamburger menu and choose a menu item

features.name: Chat Session Initialization
features.description: The chat page attempts to create a backend chat session and shows online, connecting, or offline mode based on API availability.
user_interactions: Open chat.html
Observe welcome panel and connection status
Wait for online status after session creation
See offline status if the API cannot be reached

features.name: Chat Question And Response
features.description: Users can type a question or click quick action chips, submit the message, and receive a bot response rendered as text, info card, or fallback contact card.
user_interactions: Type a question in the chat input
Click the send button or press Enter
Click quick action buttons for Jurusan, Biaya Kuliah, Pendaftaran, Beasiswa, Lokasi, and Kontak
Watch the typing indicator
Read the bot answer and generated info or fallback cards
Confirm the send button is disabled for an empty input and enabled after typing

features.name: Clear Chat
features.description: Users can clear the visible chat, restore the welcome state, delete the current backend session when online, and create a fresh session.
user_interactions: Send at least one chat message
Click the clear chat button
Verify chat bubbles are removed and the welcome state returns
Verify input is emptied and send button returns to disabled state

features.name: Theme Persistence
features.description: Users can toggle light and dark theme; the chosen theme is persisted in localStorage and reflected on both landing and chat pages.
user_interactions: Toggle the theme button on the landing page
Navigate to chat.html
Verify the selected theme remains active
Toggle the theme again from the chat header

known_limitations.issue: When served only by Apache on port 80, frontend API calls target http://localhost/api and fall back to offline mode unless Apache is configured to proxy to the Node backend.
known_limitations.impact: Backend chat session and message APIs are not exercised from the browser in that deployment mode.

known_limitations.issue: The offline local chat engine uses static client-side data and does not persist chat sessions or message history.
known_limitations.impact: Offline mode provides answers but cannot validate backend persistence behavior.
